backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile and car configuration storage with role-based access control (user/admin), exposing query and update endpoints for saving, retrieving, and listing profiles and car configurations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (3D car customizer UI, save/load configuration, dark automotive theme, hero image) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of every component, page, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with home and /customize routes wrapped in a dark ThemeProvider and a styled Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CarPreview3D.tsx: React Three Fiber component rendering a procedurally built 3D car with model-specific dimensions, dynamic body/interior colors, wheel style variants, auto-rotation, and showroom lighting.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationAct: UI component rendering Save and Load buttons for authenticated users, or a Login prompt for unauthenticated users, with loading spinner states.
frontend/src/components/CustomizationCon: Sidebar controls component providing model selection, body color swatches with custom picker, wheel style grid, interior color swatches, and accessories toggles for the car configurator.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a header containing navigation links, a logo, and an authentication button that handles Internet Identity login/logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time users to enter a driver name and create their profile, calling an onSave callback on submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider that manages Internet Identity authentication state, exposing login/logout functions and identity status via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles and car configurations against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining a dark automotive-themed design system with custom OKLCH color tokens, Tailwind layers, and utility classes for amber glows and glass panels.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CarCustomizer.tsx: Main car customizer page that manages local configuration state, handles save/load of configurations to the ICP backend, and renders the 3D preview, controls, and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component featuring a hero section with a car showroom image, headline, and CTA button linking to the customizer, plus a features grid highlighting 3D preview, customization, and save/load capabilities.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the dark automotive theme with custom fonts (Rajdhani, Inter), an extended color palette (amber, silver, charcoal, matte-black using OKLCH variables), custom border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the car customisation website's existing features (3D configurator UI, save/load, dark theme, hero image) and pending feature requests (backend actor for storing configurations), along with schema version and architectural metadata.
